src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.after: dropbox, gdrive, sftp, ftp, box, s3, gftp, http, vfs, scp

Enable Spring scheduling support.
Add a new bean definition for a Set of Longs to track job IDs, likely replacing or supplementing removed functionality.
Remove unused imports related to the old commented-out code (Lombok, Jackson, old Spring Batch classes).
Update imports to use the new Spring Batch classes required by the uncommented configuration.
Add import for java.time.Duration to support the new throughput calculation method.
Remove unused URI scheme constants that are no longer referenced in the codebase.
Remove unused client identifier constant.
Remove unused file metadata constants.
Remove unused account ID pass constants.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Add new constants for HTTP compression and concurrency settings.
Add new constants for thread pool prefixes.
Add utility method to compute throughput using java.time.Duration.
Replace Gson with Jackson ObjectMapper for JSON deserialization to align with Spring Boot standards.
Migrate from field-based @Autowired injection to constructor-based dependency injection.
Inject Queue bean directly instead of using SpEL in @RabbitListener annotation.
Add logic to expand VFS directory paths before processing the transfer job.
Track active job IDs by adding them to a Set after job launch.
Add fallback logic to parse and apply transfer application parameters (concurrency/parallelism) if the primary job request parsing fails or as a secondary step.
Remove unused CrudService dependency and associated database insertion call.
Replace System.out.println with SLF4J logger for message receipt logging.
Add logic to expand VFS directories using `VfsExpander` before job submission.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: This is new business logic. While not a JDK breaking change, it relies on the new `VfsExpander` dependency. If the dependency is missing, it breaks. However, the logic itself is an addition.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Update logging statements to remove sensitive data and use `toString()` for cleaner output.
Use the `JobExecution` ID returned by `jobLauncher.run()` instead of the request's job ID.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: The previous code used `request.getJobId()`. The new code uses `jobExecution.getJobId()` which is generated by Spring Batch. This ensures the ID returned to the client matches the actual Spring Batch job ID.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.before: return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.OK).body("Your batch job has been submitted with \n ID: " + request.getJobId());
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.after: return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.OK).body("Your batch job has been submitted with \n ID: " + jobExecution.getJobId());

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Add `jobExecution.getJobId()` to the tracked `jobIds` set.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: This is new functionality to track active job IDs. It relies on the new `jobIds` field.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Remove unused import for `CrudService`.
Replace PriorityQueue with ConcurrentLinkedQueue to support concurrent access patterns.
Update constructor to instantiate ConcurrentLinkedQueue instead of PriorityQueue.
Add SHA-256 hashing logic to condenseListToOneStream method.
Sort chunks before processing to ensure deterministic order when using non-ordered queue.
Add logging for chunk processing and hash output.
Clear the queue after condensing to prevent memory leaks or duplicate processing.
Add explicit clear method to the class.
Add SneakyThrows annotation to suppress checked exceptions from MessageDigest.
Add explicit @ToString.Exclude annotation to the data field to prevent large byte arrays from being included in the generated toString output.
Swap the types of chunkIdx and startPosition fields, likely to align with logical expectations where indices are smaller integers and positions are larger longs.
Add a new field to the EntityInfo model to store chunk size information.
Change the type of the 'size' field from long to int.
Add a new boolean field 'isLastChunk' to the model class.
Remove Lombok @Builder annotation to simplify object construction or resolve compatibility issues with the new Spring/Java 21 stack.
Add Lombok @NoArgsConstructor to ensure a no-argument constructor is generated for deserialization or framework requirements.
Remove the jobId field from the request model, likely because it is now generated server-side or handled differently.
Replace priority and chunkSize fields with a single connectionBufferSize field to change how transfer parameters are configured.

private int priority;
    @NonNull private int chunkSize;

Replace parentInfo with fileDestinationPath in Destination to simplify path handling.
Add credId field to Source inner class to support credential identification.
Replace parentInfo with fileSourcePath in Source to simplify path handling.
